summary: Block edits to already-merged migration files even when the points value stays in sync between rules.ts and the SQL.
hypothesis: The current rubric checks points-sync but not append-only, so a synced-but-illegal edit (fixture 0001) is approved. Adding an explicit append-only check should lift recall on 0001 without flagging clean PRs.
decision_note: Seed example — illustrates the schema and pairs with the runs/*.sample.json demo. Run Stages 4-5 before opening a PR.

summary: Add a Block-on for non-atomic read-modify-write on shared counters/quotas (select count then update count+1) where concurrent requests can exceed a cap.
hypothesis: This class shipped past review once (invite uses_count). A targeted check should catch it; needs a clean fixture (a counter update that IS atomic / single-statement) to guard precision before testing.
decision_note: Seed example from a real past miss. Needs a hard fixture + a clean near-miss authored at Stage 3.
